Kwara Ti Wa Ni

A people-centered vision for a greater Kwara.

Engr. Olufemi Sanni, FNICE, FNSE — ARABA

Our Vision in Action

Discover the key focus areas driving Kwara Ti Wa Ni forward.

Key Focus Areas

Jobs & Enterprise

Creating an enabling environment for businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs.

Education & Skills

Improving access to quality education and practical skills.

Infrastructure

Developing organized, functional public systems and urban order.

Security & Trust

Advocating effective and collaborative security structures.

Youth & Innovation

Supporting creativity, technology, and digital innovation.

Inclusive Governance

Ensuring every voice and community matters in decision-making.

Be Part of the Movement

Join thousands of Kwarans committed to building a better future.

Kwara Ti Wa Ni — The Future Belongs to All of Us
